segments.text: Japan has already solved them all. From cold food to sticky lids, the design will make your life so much easier.
First, we have the self-feeding lunch boxes. Their design uses hidden chemistry. Pull a string and the steam heats your food perfectly. No microwave,
no cold lunch ever again. But this design was just the beginning. Designers studied lotus leaves and redesigned yogurt lids. This design means it comes
off perfectly clean every time. No more licking lids, no waste. But here's my favorite one. They completely redesigned the sauce packets for us. No tearing,
which means no mess. You fold it till it snaps and the perfect sauce flows from the center. They can save us from sticky fingers forever. So innovative.
Subscribe for more amazing design content.
